name: How is fault determined in occupational illness workers comp cases?
description: No-fault: prove work caused illness; employer liability strict[1].

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in occupational illness workers comp cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault: prove work caused illness; employer liability strict[1].
acceptedAnswer.description:
No fault needed; it's no-fault system if work caused or contributed.

Workers comp covers illnesses arising from employment hazards, regardless of employer negligence[1][3].

- Prove exposure and causation.
- Pre-existing doesn't bar if work-incurred[1].
- Multiple employers possible.

Focus on medical nexus; attorney handles complexities.
